caption: A screen recording captures a website for a "List Randomizer" from RANDOM.ORG. The page features a numbered list of sports memorabilia items, including names like "FRANK THOMAS," "KEN GRIFFEY JR," and "KIRBY POCHETT." To the right of the list is an image of a man in a black t-shirt wearing a baseball cap, sitting in front of a backdrop with "YascaleBreaks.com" logos. On-screen text indicates "There were 48 items in your list. Here they are in random order." A red "Subscribe" button for YouTube is visible at the bottom. In the later frames, the interface changes to a result screen stating "You have randomized this list 2 times," with buttons labeled "Again" and "Go Back." The IP address "IP: 47.144.140.232" and a timestamp of "2021-05-01 14:07:14 UTC" are displayed.
